message:
feat(cli): enable conformance crate for CLI feature flag

Update Cargo.toml to include conformance as an optional dependency
when the cli feature is enabled:

- Add 'dep:conformance' to cli feature requirements
- Add conformance dependency with path = "conformance" and optional = true
- Uses package name asupersync-conformance

This enables 'asupersync conformance matrix' command when building
with --features cli.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ tls-native-roots = ["tls", "dep:rustls-native-certs"]
 # Enable webpki root certificates for TLS
 tls-webpki-roots = ["tls", "dep:webpki-roots"]
 # Enable CLI tooling (trace inspection).
-cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:time", "trace-compression"]
+cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:time", "trace-compression", "dep:conformance"]
 
 [lib]
 path = "src/lib.rs"
@@ -76,6 +76,8 @@ opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.28", default-features = false, features = ["m
 tower = { version = "0.5.3", optional = true }
 # Optional proc macros for structured concurrency
 asupersync-macros = { path = "asupersync-macros", optional = true }
+# Optional conformance tooling (CLI + reports)
+conformance = { package = "asupersync-conformance", path = "conformance", optional = true }
 # Optional LZ4 compression for trace files
 lz4_flex = { version = "0.11", optional = true }
 # Optional visibility macro for test-internals feature
